title: Proposals / Quotes
excerpt:
Are you generation Proposals / Quotes as part of your business workflow? Let’s talk! 
Comment below and I’ll reach out. 
Ron Kimhi from monday.com CRM team

posts.author: Ronk (Ron Kimhi)
posts.cookedHtml:
image1206×678 43.9 KB

Are you generation Proposals / Quotes as part of your business workflow? Let’s talk!

Comment below and I’ll reach out.

Ron Kimhi from monday.com CRM team

posts.author: turboroof (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml: I am. I use Monday as CRM and connect it to my custom app to build quotes/proposals. Much of the integration is through Integromat

posts.author: Knowa (Noah)
posts.cookedHtml: Quoting is a very large part of our workflow.

posts.author: JimBahr (Jim Bahr)
posts.cookedHtml: Always… it’s the main reason we have M.com

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: Curious, what’s there to talk about? It is an important part of our worlflow. We use Simplicate.nl for now and the do it pretty wel. Happy to talk

posts.author: abiciea (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, we do. Please reach out

posts.author: SameE (SAMUEL T ENSOGNA)
posts.cookedHtml: I use harvest to do digital shared estimates that the clients accepts, downloads a pdf, and generates a Po. I turn them into invoices in quickbooks… I would love to have this automated! Love to chat.

posts.author: JameSamueLind (James Lind)
posts.cookedHtml: We do our quotes in quickbooks. Is anyone using anything like zapier or integromat to automate with Monday?

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, we do. Keen to hear what you might be planning on this @Ronk

posts.author: Chelle (Michelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
we do, we use paint scout for quotes currently
would love to know what monday is planning

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml: @Ronk can you please update us on this. Your announcement sounded promising, but I haven’t heard anything since.

posts.author: andrewalmand (Andrew Almand)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ron,

My name is Andrew from Venue Industries. My sales team uses Monday to track their proposals and quotes.

I’ve been looking into ways to generate PDFs within Monday.com via integrations to keep my team in Monday as much as possible. But none of them really work 100% how we want. Either they don’t offer the ability to pick the data we want, or the template building process is too complicated. I’m hoping that Monday is working on a way to generate documents from boards/items/subitems.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Thanks,
Andrew Almand
andrew@venueindustries.com

posts.author: Ronk (Ron Kimhi)
posts.cookedHtml:
@turboroof @Knowa @JimBahr @Eltjo @abiciea @SameE @JameSamueLind @TheOtherPM @Chelle @andrewalmand Hi all here it is:

The app is located as an item view - once you enter the link below, you will notice an “add view” button on the top right of your updates items updates section - from there you can find the app and complete the installation. * You have to be an account admin in order to install the app to your account.

Link: monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done

We can’t wait to hear your thoughts. Please share any feedback as soon as possible by replying thread or reach out directly here: ronki@monday.com

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Ronk this looks good… from an inicial test i can give you some feedback now.

  • Downloading to a PDF doesnt include the uploaded company logo image. (But Preview its showing properly the logo).
  • Possibility to set fixed text to another language. Ex. spanish.
  • Maybe you could choose the items from another board (or a linked board) with standard items to avoid type every quote´s item from scratch.

posts.author: Emil (Emil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ronk,

Before I install this on our account I’d like a small preview. Could you please make a short video where you run through how it works?

Thanks.

posts.author: peppinob (Giuseppe)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Ronk I installed the app but then I don’t find it. Where should i find the app? In “Integrations”?

posts.author: nealb (Neal Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml:
its under item view like this screenshot
so its really a view in a pulse but when you add it to an item in the board its added to all items in that board

Screenshot 2021-01-12 at 18.28.291747×419 82.5 KB

posts.author: peppinob (Giuseppe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the explanation. I think the item view is a really good idea, here are my suggestions:

  • items fields in the quote form should be linked to subitem columns. That’s how we organize our quotes in MDC (and get pdf trough Integromat +gdoc)
  • quote template should be editable (eg. we need italian language)
  • pdf output should be uploaded directly in a file column
  • monday logo at bottom should be avoided for pro users

posts.author: JimBahr (Jim Bahr)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I can see how this would be useful for many businesses, however we are a consultancy - our quotes are much more involved & don’t lend themselves to ‘itemizing’. Good luck!

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Ronk, just had the time to check it out really quick. If you look at it as an invoice, not a proposal it’s not bad at all. But I have to say that I am in the same situation as @JimBahr, we need to be able to elaborate far more in our proposals. I’ll be watching progression and new releases on this app for possible future usage. Thanks

posts.author: jessie.stroud (Jessie Stroud)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, please get in touch, I’m about to embark on determining if Monday can handle the full sales pipeline process including estimations and RFQs.

posts.author: gmmyingtao (Mingming Kellogg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I need this feature. However, can’t use it until the Monday branding is gone.

image676×698 24.3 KB

posts.author: arturo (Arturo Sánchez)
posts.cookedHtml: I am the same way. Now I am using eQuotes but it doesn’t fit 100% as I wish

posts.author: dgrassb (david)
posts.cookedHtml:
Chelle:

paint scout

yeah, the logo and the fact that you cant have a different lenguage kills the app use

posts.author: bjornheldaas (Bjørn Heldaas)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am considering using this for my quotes. As I did my initial T/E theese are my issues with it

Logo at the bottom needs to go.
Text in the template must be possible to change
The ability to connect a products board and pick products from it into the quote
Tax / VAT separate for each item. In Norway we have different VAT rates for different products
Sending the qoute directly as an PDF with the integrated mail adress (communihub?)

Is work beeing done on this app or is it “done”?
It has got a lot of potential, but it is not quite done yet. It would be an awesome feature in Monday.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone
Great app by the monday team but we also wanted more so we recently released an app that can create invoices, quotes etc right in your monday.com board using items in your board. Some of the features of the app include:
Select items from your board into your invoice
Select items from connected boards
Multi-language support. Edit any field so that you can input your preferred language.
Choose your preferred date format.
And many more …


If interested, please fill this form to help us understand which features to prioritize in the later versions. After filling the form, you will be given the link to install the app.
You can find more about the app in the community post here


If you have any questions, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com

posts.author: sonia_eligeo (Sonia Sandhu)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! eQuotes 2.0 is coming soon The app has everything you’re looking for, including custom data selection and easy-to-build templates. Stay tuned!

posts.author: carolinem (Caroline McKinnon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes! We have actually just paid a Monday partner to custom-design us a proposal generator in our Monday environment. Is Monday about to release this feature for FREE?? We would love to know ASAP

We are going to build it built into our CRM (which lives in Monday) so that it pulls the customer’s info and info from pricing tables into a pre-populated Word document.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @carolinem ,
The app I mentioned above can do what you have mentioned although the data can be downloaded as a pdf and not a Word document.

image682×524 24.8 KB

To give it a try, please fill out this form so we have know which features to prioritize in the next releases.
Thank you

posts.author: JohnTMF (John)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, I’ve been waiting for this for years as well.
